name: Carolina Chocolate Pecan Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Microwave 3/4 cup butter and 2 oz chocolate squares on HIGH for 1-2 minutes, stirring every 30 seconds until melted.
2. Stir in the crumbs, coconut, and pecans. Press into the bottom of a 13 x 9-inch baking pan. Chill for 30 minutes.
3. Mix the cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla until well blended. Spread over the crust. Chill for 30 minutes.
4. Microwave the remaining butter and chocolate squares on HIGH for 1-2 minutes, stirring every 30 seconds until melted. Spread over the cream cheese layer. Chill.
5. Cut into squares. Makes 4 dozen.
